title: Vivi Faces Her Choice
description: On pages 7, 8, 9, 10, this part focuses on the farewell plan. Vivi and the crew try to find a way to say goodbye without exposing their bond to the Navy or putting Alabasta in danger.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Farewell Plan sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Crocodile, Luffy, Vivi, Nami, Usopp.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Mr. S and his partner were defeated?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Hmm... Surely there must be some mistake.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: those pirates are here in this town...

summary: Vivi and the crew try to find a way to say goodbye without exposing their bond to the Navy or putting Alabasta in danger.
